info.name: Treasure Trove — Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Treasure Trove luxury furniture platform.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` to `http://localhost:9000` for local dev.
2. Run **Auth → Admin Login** first — the `adminToken` variable is set automatically.
3. Run **Auth → Customer Login** to set `customerToken`.
4. Set `publishableKey` to the value from `NEXT_PUBLIC_MEDUSA_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` in storefront `.env.local`.

**Folders:**
- 🔐 Auth
- 🛍️ Store — Products / Collections / Cart / Checkout / Customers / Custom
- 👑 Admin — Products / Inventory / Orders / Customers / Uploads / Promotions / Regions & Tax / Shipping / API Keys & Users / Custom
- 🔔 Webhooks

request.description: Authenticate as an admin user. Sets `adminToken` variable automatically.
Authenticate as a store customer. Sets `customerToken` variable automatically.
List all published store products. Supports filtering by collection_id, handle, order, limit, offset.
Creates a new cart. Sets `cartId` variable automatically.
provider_id options: `pp_razorpay_razorpay` (INR) | `pp_stripe_stripe` (USD/AED)
Custom route. Validates: name (required), email (valid format), message (min 20 chars). HTML tags are stripped. No auth required.
Expects 400 with VALIDATION_ERROR and per-field details.
Prices are in smallest currency unit: paise for INR (1 INR = 100 paise), cents for USD. Sets `productId` and `variantId` automatically.

formdata.description: CSV with columns: title, handle, description, variant_sku, price_inr, price_usd, stock, material, size, finish, wood_type, dimensions, warranty

request.description: Must create a stock location before setting inventory quantities on variants. Sets `locationId` variable.
Sets the stocked quantity for a specific inventory item at a specific stock location. This is what makes a product variant purchasable.

formdata.description: Supported: JPEG, PNG, WEBP. Max size ~50 MB.

request.description:
Step 1 of product image upload.

Field name must be `files` (not `file`).
Returns: { files: [{ id, url }] }

The returned `url` is then passed to Create/Update Product in the `images` or `thumbnail` field.

In dev (no AWS credentials): URL = http://localhost:9000/uploads/filename.jpg
In prod (with AWS): URL = https://cdn.treasuretrove.in/products/filename.jpg
Step 2 after uploading. Use the URL returned from POST /admin/uploads. `thumbnail` = card/listing image. `images` = full gallery shown on the product detail page.
Custom route. Sets `metadata.deactivated = true` on the customer. Returns the updated customer object.
10% off entire order. Customers apply with code WELCOME10.
₹500 flat off (value in paise: 50000 paise = ₹500).
Flat rate shipping. Amounts in smallest currency unit (paise for INR, cents for USD). 49900 paise = ₹499.
The returned `token` goes into NEXT_PUBLIC_MEDUSA_PUBLISHABLE_KEY in the storefront .env.local.
No auth required (AUTHENTICATE = false). Signature is verified via HMAC-SHA256 using RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET. The raw body must not be modified. Other events: `payment.failed`.
No auth required (AUTHENTICATE = false). Signature header format: `t=<unix_timestamp>,v1=<hmac_sha256>`. Other events: `payment_intent.payment_failed`, `charge.refunded`, `payment_intent.canceled`.
